author: artlbv
body: Wires the new cms-hls4ml/NNPuppiTauModel package into the SCRAM build following the L1TSC4NGJetModel/AXOL1TL precedent, so TauNNIdHW can load its weights via hls4mlEmulator::ModelLoader instead of in-tree global arrays (avoids the symbol-clobbering bug class in cms-sw/cmssw#49632).
title: Add NNPuppiTauModel external spec and toolfile
